qDef.qDef:
If($(vu_slim_version_for_anonymous)=1 AND $(vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back)<>-1,'This application is currently in the slimmed down mode for an anonymous-enabled tenant. This is to reduce the overall size of the application''s RAM footprint so that it has a marginal effect on the capacity quota of the tenant. Some sheets are not available while in this mode and are greyed out. In addition, this application is currently in batch mode for reloading app metadata. App metadata must be fully loaded for analysis. Once batch reloading is completed, ensure that the ''vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back'' is set back to ''-1'' to complete the process. At that point, select metadata analysis can be viewed in this application.',
If($(vu_slim_version_for_anonymous)=1,'This application is currently in the slimmed down mode for an anonymous-enabled tenant. This is to reduce the overall size of the application''s RAM footprint so that it has a marginal effect on the capacity quota of the tenant. Some sheets are not available while in this mode and are greyed out.',
If($(vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back)<>-1,'This application is currently in batch mode for reloading app metadata. App metadata must be fully loaded for analysis. Once batch reloading is completed, ensure that the ''vu_app_metadata_initial_days_back'' is set back to ''-1'' to complete the process. At that point, metadata analysis can be viewed in this application.',
'')))

extensionMeta.name: Text
extensionMeta.description: Display text, links, and measures. Add tables with rows and columns. Format and color the text. Add background image and color.
extensionMeta.author: QlikTech International AB

bundle.name: Qlik Dashboard bundle
bundle.description:
This is a set of supported objects that will facilitate dashboard creation in Qlik Sense. These can be used in addition to the objects found under "Charts".

For limitations and support conditions, see the documentation.

qFieldDefs: =ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')

qDef.qDef:
=If(ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')='Data Last Reloaded',TimeStamp(ReloadTime() + $(vReloadTimeDiffFromGMT)),
If(ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')='QVD Current Volume (in Days)',Floor(Max({1}SessionStartTimeDate)) - Floor(Min({1}SessionStartTimeDate))+1,
If(ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')='Current Version','v$(app_version)',
If(ValueList('Data Last Reloaded','QVD Current Volume (in Days)','Current Version','Latest Version')='Latest Version','$(vLatestVersion)'))))
